title: Internetsuche ueber Chrome

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing search results directly on a white background (no browser window frame, no titlebar, no containing box). At the top, a small magnifying glass icon in #073B4C next to a thin rounded search input shape in #F5F5F5 with a 1px #E5E7EB border. Below, three search result entries displayed as a clean vertical list: each entry has a short title line in #118AB2 (12px, link-colored) and a description line in #8A8F98 (10px), separated by subtle spacing. The illustration conveys: Claude sucht fuer dich im Internet und fasst die Ergebnisse zusammen.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos (no Google, no Chrome logo), terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
